businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform — from core US defense/intelligence partner to commercial AI powerhouse
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds software platforms that analyze and integrate complex data. Since AIP (AI Platform) launch, the commercial segment has exploded. Q4 2025 revenue $1.407B (+70% YoY), adjusted operating margin 57%. Monday close $156.43 (-0.46%). Consolidating after last week's +15% surge. UK MoD £240M sole-source contract extension reported. P/E 248.08x, P/S 83.99x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts: US DoD, CIA, NSA — software licenses and maintenance (~60% of revenue)
Commercial segment: AIP-based enterprise AI analytics platform subscriptions — US commercial revenue +137% YoY
International government: NATO, UK MoD, Ukraine — ~15% of revenue
Professional services: Deployment and customization consulting

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on EPS $0.63. AI premium but historically elevated

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS $1.34. Reflects high growth but still expensive

keyMetrics.name: Adj. Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Q4 2025 basis. Among the highest in software

keyMetrics.name: FCF Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high cash conversion. Q4 FCF $1.25B

keyMetrics.name: Rule of 40
keyMetrics.interpretation: Growth 56% + operating margin 57%. Elite software efficiency

keyMetrics.name: Net Cash
keyMetrics.interpretation: Zero debt. Extremely strong balance sheet

growthDrivers.title: Iran War Prolonging → Defense AI Demand Surge
growthDrivers.description: As the Iran conflict continues under Trump, investors are piling into Palantir as the defense AI leader. +15% last week. Defense represents 60% of revenue.

growthDrivers.title: UK MoD £240M Sole-Source Contract Extension
growthDrivers.description: UK Ministry of Defence extended a £240M (~$300M) sole-source contract with Palantir. Confirms international government revenue expansion.

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 Guidance $7.19B (+60.5%)
growthDrivers.description: Guidance issued during Q4 earnings beat consensus. AIP adoption acceleration as the backdrop.

growthDrivers.title: Anthropic Blacklist Impact Limited
growthDrivers.description: DoD blacklisted Anthropic, but AIP has model-agnostic architecture. Can switch to OpenAI, Meta alternatives.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Government security clearances (Top Secret/SCI), 20-year defense/intelligence relationships, AIP enterprise AI platform expansion as the core moat.

moats.description: Top Secret/SCI clearance holder. Extremely high barrier to competitor entry.
Gotham/Foundry deeply integrated into customer data infrastructure. Very high replacement costs.
AIP bootcamps rapidly expanding enterprise customers. More usage → better models.

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data cloud platform. Enterprise data analytics competition

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Direct competitor but smaller scale

competitors.name: Anduril
competitors.detail: Defense AI startup. Autonomous weapons systems specialist

recentNews.significance: PLTR rising amid broad tech selloff. Defense AI leader positioning

recentNews.headline: UBS upgrades PLTR to Strong Buy — target $180
recentNews.significance: Major IB upgrade. Expanding institutional interest signal

analystOpinions.notableComment: UBS Strong Buy upgrade ($180), Rosenblatt $200, Mizuho Buy upgrade ($195). Buy opinions expanding. However, 9 Holds reflect valuation concerns.

risks.title: Extreme Valuation
risks.description: P/E 248x, P/S 84x, Forward P/E 117x. Most expensive large-cap software stock.

risks.title: CEO Share Sales
risks.description: Alex Karp's regular large-scale share disposals. Insider selling signal.

risks.title: Government Contract Concentration
risks.description: 60% of revenue from government contracts. Budget cuts would be a direct hit.

risks.title: Geopolitical Dependency
risks.description: Iran war benefits demand, but peace could weaken momentum.

risks.title: Commercial Revenue Sustainability Unproven
risks.description: US commercial +137% sustainability not yet confirmed. Possible initial AIP adoption spike.

buyReasons.title: Defense AI Infrastructure Monopoly
buyReasons.rationale: Top Secret clearance + 20-year relationships. Extremely high defense AI entry barriers.

buyReasons.title: Commercial Revenue Explosion (+137% YoY)
buyReasons.rationale: AIP bootcamp strategy rapidly expanding enterprise customers. TAM expansion.

buyReasons.title: Rule of 40 = 113%
buyReasons.rationale: Growth + operating margin totaling 113%. Elite software efficiency.

buyReasons.title: Iran War → Defense Budget Expansion
buyReasons.rationale: Geopolitical tensions driving US/NATO defense spending increases. Direct beneficiary.

overallOpinion: Consolidating at $156.43 after last week's +15% surge. Iran war prolongation has strengthened PLTR's positioning as the defense AI leader. Trading above 50-day and 200-day SMAs, maintaining technical uptrend. RSI 56.4 is neutral, not overbought. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B (+60.5%) and Rule of 40 at 113% show strong fundamentals, but Forward P/E 117x prices in perfect execution. UBS, Mizuho, and other major IBs upgrading, expanding institutional interest. Near-term resistance at $160-$165, support at $140.
